ns0:entry.ns0:title: ArvinLovegood/go-stock
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ArvinLovegood/go-stock
Language: go
🦄🦄🦄AI赋能股票分析：AI加持的股票分析/选股工具。股票行情获取，AI热点资讯分析，AI资金/财务分析，涨跌报警推送。支持A股，港股，美股。支持市场整体/个股情绪分析，AI辅助选股等。数据全部保留在本地。支持DeepSeek，OpenAI， Ollama，LMStudio，AnythingLLM，硅基流动，火山方舟，阿里云百炼等平台或模型。

ns0:entry.ns0:title: NoFxAiOS/nofx
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/NoFxAiOS/nofx
Language: go
Your personal AI trading assistant. Any market. Any model. Pay with USDC, not API keys.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Wei-Shaw/sub2api
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Wei-Shaw/sub2api
Language: go
Sub2API-CRS2 一站式开源中转服务，让 Claude、Openai 、Gemini、Antigravity订阅统一接入，支持拼车共享，更高效分摊成本，原生工具无缝使用。

ns0:entry.ns0:title: XTLS/Xray-core
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/XTLS/Xray-core
Language: go
Xray, Penetrates Everything. Also the best v2ray-core. Where the magic happens. An open platform for various uses.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: coder/coder
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/coder/coder
Language: go
Secure environments for developers and their agents

ns0:entry.ns0:title: danielmiessler/Fabric
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/danielmiessler/Fabric
Language: go
Fabric is an open-source framework for augmenting humans using AI. It provides a modular system for solving specific problems using a crowdsourced set of AI prompts that can be used anywhere.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: direnv/direnv
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/direnv/direnv
Language: go
unclutter your .profile

ns0:entry.ns0:title: etcd-io/etcd
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/etcd-io/etcd
Language: go
Distributed reliable key-value store for the most critical data of a distributed system

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/evcc-io/evcc
Language: go

ns0:entry.ns0:title: fengshao1227/ccg-workflow
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/fengshao1227/ccg-workflow
Language: go
多模型协作开发系统 - Claude 编排 + Codex 后端 + Gemini 前端，28 个命令覆盖开发全流程，一键安装零配置

ns0:entry.ns0:title: juanfont/headscale
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/juanfont/headscale
Language: go
An open source, self-hosted implementation of the Tailscale control server

ns0:entry.ns0:title: mudler/LocalAI
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/mudler/LocalAI
Language: go
🤖 The free, Open Source alternative to OpenAI, Claude and others. Self-hosted and local-first. Drop-in replacement, running on consumer-grade hardware. No GPU required. Runs gguf, transformers, diffusers and many more. Features: Generate Text, MCP, Audio, Video, Images, Voice Cloning, Distributed, P2P and decentralized inference

ns0:entry.ns0:title: navidrome/navidrome
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/navidrome/navidrome
Language: go
🎧☁️ Your Personal Streaming Service

ns0:entry.ns0:title: psviderski/uncloud
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/psviderski/uncloud
Language: go
A lightweight tool for deploying and managing containerised applications across a network of Docker hosts. Bridging the gap between Docker and Kubernetes ✨

ns0:entry.ns0:title: v2fly/domain-list-community
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/v2fly/domain-list-community
